verses.text: Keimah in mualtung lam ka ento hi. Keimah huhna koi lai pan hong pai ding ahi hiam
Van leh lei a bawl Topa' kiang panin keimah huhna hong pai hi
Amah in ka khe taalsaklo ding a, kei hong kempa lusulo ding hi
En un, Israel a kempa lusulo a, zong ihmulo hi
Topa in nang hong cing ding a, nangmah a hong hu dingin na kiangah hong om hi
Sunin ni in nang hong gimsaklo ding a, zanin kha in zong nang hong sukhalo ding hi
Topa in siatna khempeuh panin nang hong hu ding a, amah in a muan'huai-in nang hong kem ding hi
Topa in tu-a kipan a tawntungin na vaksuk na vaktohna-ah nang hong kem ding hi.
